title: Senior Plant Manager at Kirloskar Electric

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Kirloskar Electric
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Kirloskar Electric in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Kirloskar Electric:
Kirloskar Electric is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kirloskar Electric!
